description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a combination of white and wood-textured panels, with two garage doors flanking a central entryway that includes a wooden door and a small overhang. The rear of the house has large glass doors and upper-level balconies with metal railings, providing outdoor space for the upper floor. The side walls are mostly solid with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy and a minimalist aesthetic. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and a strip of green lawn surrounding it. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white paneling, dual garages, and upper balconies, set on a rectangular lot with a paved driveway and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual garages, central wooden entry door, and a paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, mostly solid white wall, and a glimpse of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring large glass doors, upper balconies with metal railings, and extensive green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and mostly solid white wall, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front and rear, minimal side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a small overhang, flanked by two garage doors and accessed via a paved walkway
